title: Emergency Response Planning New Version
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable safety programme for strengthening awareness and practice in emergency response planning new version.
whyThisMatters: Emergency Response Planning New Version helps workplace teams recognize hazards, apply controls, and make emergency response planning new version part of everyday operations. Participants explore Understand the legal requirements for emergency response planning, Module 1: Legal Requirements, and An overview of Section 15, 16, 17, 18, 20 & 21 of OSH Act 1994 so safety expectations become easier to understand, discuss, and act on.
builtFor: Employees in operational, site-based, or technical roles
Supervisors responsible for daily safety practices
Teams that need stronger safety awareness and prevention habits
walkAwayWith: Recognize relevant workplace hazards and risk factors earlier.
Apply safer work practices and basic control measures.
Understand individual responsibility in safety, health, or environmental performance.
Support better reporting, prevention, and follow-through at work.

modules.title: Understand the legal requirements for emergency response planning
An overview of Section 15, 16, 17, 18, 20 & 21 of OSH Act 1994
An overview of OHSAS18001 and ISO14001

methodologyCaption: The workshop uses workplace examples, discussion, and practical hazard-recognition activities to make safe behavior concrete.
